payload.reason: HookFailureDetails helper in cli/errors.go extracts *hooks.HookFailedError into (human msg with last 10 stderr lines, details map with full hook_stderr + hook_exit_code + hook_truncated). Wired into close.go's hook_failed path and create/update/reopen's write_failed (hook errors now surface as hook_failed not write_failed). Tests cover helper unit behavior + close/create integration.
